MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON NOV-02-2021 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE BURKE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF JOHN BURKE REPRESENTED BY JACQUELINE BURKE IS PRESENT. WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO PLUMAS COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $12,128.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SGI RESORT PROPERTIES, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS JON AND JACQUELINE BURKE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SGI PROPERTIES IS NOT PRESENT. MIRIAM ORTIZ, STATES TO THE COURT THAT SHE IS PRESENT ON A LIMITED SCOPE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT. COURT DETERMINES THAT MIRIAM ORTIZ IS AN ATTORNEY AND THAT HER APPEARANCE IS NOT AUTHORIZED/ALLOWED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. MIRIAM ORTIZ IS NOT RETAINED COUNSEL, NOR IS SHE ASSOCIATED WITH DEFENDANT SGI RESORT PROPERTIES IN ANY CAPACITIY OTHER THAN THAT OF A PERSONAL NATURE. MIRIAM ORTIZ, STATES THAT DEFENDANT IS AWARE OF TODAYS TRIAL PROCEEDINGS BUT WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR. COURT DISCUSSES PLAINTIFFS PROCESS OF SERVICE TO DEFENDANT SGI RESORT PROPERTIES. PLAINTIFF'S INFORMS THE COURT THAT MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS FOR SERVICE WERE MADE TO J. STEPHEN SCHOFF, AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR SERVICE AT THE AGENT OF SERVICE ADDRESS OF 421 WILHAGGIN ST, SACRAMENTO, CA 95864. AFTER MULTIPLE FAILED ATTEMPTS FOR SERVICE AT THE AOS SERVICE ADDRESS, PLAINTIFFS SERVED DEFENDANT BY PERSONAL SERVICE AT THE ENTITY ADDRESS AT 348 BEAR RUN, CLIO, CA. (SERVICE INFORMATION OBTAINED FROM THE CALIRONFIA SECRETARY OF STATE'S WEBSITE) THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF AUGUST 3, 2021 STATES THAT THE PARTY AUTHORIZED TO ACCEPT SERVICE IS RICHARD AIPLO. COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT SGI RESORT PROPERTIES IS AWARE OF TODAY'S TRIAL AND THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS VALID. DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS RENDERED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKE, JON BURKE, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SGI RESORT PROPERTIES, LLC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,255.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sullivan, Esq., for Plaintiffs/Respondents Jon Burke and Jacquline Burke [not present]; Miriam Ortiz, Esq., for and with Richard Aiple, General Manager for McComas Resort/SGI Resort Properties.

Court and counsel argue the first issue before the Court: whether there is a basis to vacate the lower court's default judgment against Defendant/Appellant.

The Court denies the Motion to Vacate Judgment.

Court and counsel argue whether the Appeal was timely filed. The Court finds the appeal is untimely and affirms the judgment below.

Mr. Sullivan requests an assessment of Attorney fees in the amount of $1,000. In the absence of a finding of bad faith for the filing of the appeal, the Court assesses attorney fees for Plaintiff/Respondent and against Defendant/Appellant SGI Resoert Properties in the amount of $150.00.

No exhibits.

Judge: Hon. Harold Kahn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D505)
